features: 5 Litres Of Highly Concentrated Professional Standard Carpet Cleaner Shampoo - For Use In Wet-System Carpet Cleaning Machines, Rug Cleaner & To Use As Spot Cleaning Solution In Spot Cleaner Machine
Powerful Carpet Cleaner Solution Works Deeps Into Fibres To Effectively Clean All Types Of Soiling, Whilst Neutralising Odours & Removing Stains Such As Cat Urine, Faeces, Dirt & General Pet Mess
Odour Treatment Works To Remove Bad Odour From Deep In The Carpet Pile - Use To Treat Dog & Cat Urine, Vomit, Food & Drink Spillages, & Different Types Of Odours From Soiling
Wool & Delicate Fabric Safe, Suitable To Clean Carpets & Upholstery - Use On Carpets & Rugs, Wool, Upholstery, Sofas, Pet Bedding, Throws & Different Types Of Fabrics
Cost Effective Professional Standard Carpet Shampoo - Works in Wet-System Carpet Cleaner Shampoo Machines Or Spot Cleaner Carpet Machines
Trusted By Professional Carpet Cleaner Companies Daily For a Pro Deep Clean Finish - Formula Developed To Give a High Standard, Effective Home Clean

Simply Carpet Shampoo by Dirtbusters Merchant video Simply Carpet Cleaner Shampoo Powered By: Neutralises Odours Eliminate bad odours, including urine & Other accidents! Our Odour treatment prevents odour and keeps your space fresh longer. Lifts Stains Revitalize your carpets with advanced Stain-Lift Technology, that works deep into carpet fibres to lift & effectively remove soiling. Revives Carpets Revive your carpet with a Pro Deep clean, to help restore colours, remove odours, and enjoy a longer lasting freshness. Multi Use Versatile spot cleaner for upholstery, all carpet types, and car seats. Lifts stains fast with a residue-free finish for fresh, spotless results! Previous page Next page 1 Revives Carpets 2 Odour Treatment 3 Spotless Clean Powerful Deep Clean & Deodorise - Simply Carpet Cleaner Shampoo Solution Experience pro-grade cleaning with our 5L Simply Carpet Shampoo By Dirtbusters. Ideal for any machine, it erases dirt, stains, and odours from carpets, rugs, and upholstery. It's safe for delicate fabrics too. Say goodbye to tough stains and unpleasant odours. This cost-effective solution works with all major carpet cleaner machines, delivering a deep clean without the high cost. Carpets & Rugs - Pet Bedding - Pillows & Cushions - Throws & Blankets - Sofa & Armchairs - Curtains
